name: Praveen
tagline: Turning complex challenges into simple, scalable, and impactful solutions.
bucketQuote: a bucket full of ideas waiting to spill
skillsSubtitle: skills mean nothing until they build something real.

about.intro: Hello, I'm Praveen — a software developer passionate about building digital products.
about.highlight: I enjoy turning ideas into scalable and meaningful solutions.
about.bio: My journey into technology has always been driven by curiosity and a passion for creating. Today, I specialize in developing modern applications and digital experiences that solve real-world problems. Whether it's building mobile apps, designing intuitive user experiences, or developing scalable systems, I enjoy creating products that deliver value and make a positive impact on people's lives.

projects.title: 3D Flutter Portfolio
projects.description: An interactive 3D portfolio built with Flutter, featuring immersive animations, 3D models, and seamless navigation to showcase my skills and projects.

projects.title: Flutter Blog App
projects.description: A full-stack blog application built with Flutter and Firebase, featuring authentication, blog publishing, image uploads, and BLoC-based clean architecture.

projects.title: Real Estate DApp
projects.description: A decentralized real estate marketplace built on Ethereum's Sepolia network, enabling secure and transparent property transactions through smart contracts. Features include property listing, ownership transfer, reviews, price updates, and decentralized storage using IPFS, with MetaMask wallet integration for seamless blockchain interactions.
